mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.name as menu_name, m.code as menu_code FROM ag_property_menu a LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON a.menu_id = m.id WHERE a.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.is_deleted = '0' AND m.nature = '2' ORDER BY m.seq

SELECT m.id, m.name as menu_name, m.code as menu_code FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.is_deleted = '0' AND m.nature = '2' AND m.id NOT IN ( SELECT menu_id FROM ag_property_menu WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ) ORDER BY m.seq
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ag_property_menu (id, company_id, menu_id) VALUES
(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{companyId}, #{menuId})
